title: Evidence Edge
description: One directed edge in the Track B translational evidence graph, connecting two evidence nodes along the variant -> gene -> pathway -> drug -> trial chain (plus disease and topic side links). Endpoints always reference existing evidence_node node_ids; dangling edges are dropped at build time.

score.description: Edge weight/confidence where applicable (e.g. normalised -log10(p) or L2G score); may be null.

evidence.description: Short human-readable evidence label for the edge, e.g. 'gwas', 'l2g', 'gene_pathway_map', 'intervention_mechanism_map'.

provenance.description: Supporting facts for the edge (source record ids, raw values, mechanism crosswalk, etc.).
